title: Your First Real Conversation
description: Have a simple but real conversation in your target language using survival phrases.

steps.title: Choose a target language
steps.instruction: Pick a language you want to explore. We will focus on a 5-minute survival conversation script.
steps.prompt: What language are you exploring today? (Or pick one: Spanish, French, Japanese, Mandarin, Arabic)

steps.title: Learn the greeting exchange
steps.instruction: A minimal conversation has: greeting, name exchange, how-are-you, and farewell. Learn these 8 phrases in your chosen language.
steps.prompt: Practice the greeting exchange out loud: Hello / My name is ___ / Nice to meet you / How are you? / I am well, thank you / And you? / I am also well / Goodbye

steps.title: Notice the phonemes
steps.instruction: Find one sound in these phrases that does not exist in your native language. Listen to a native speaker recording.
steps.prompt: What is the unfamiliar sound? Describe where in your mouth you think it is produced.

steps.title: Record yourself
steps.instruction: Record yourself saying the 8-phrase exchange. Listen back.
steps.prompt: What surprised you when you heard yourself? What sounds natural? What sounds foreign?

steps.title: Add one question
steps.instruction: Learn to ask and answer: 'Where are you from?' in your target language.
steps.prompt: Write the phrase, its IPA transcription if you can find it, and your answer: 'I am from ___'

steps.title: Reflect on the experience
steps.instruction: A full conversation has happened -- even if short.
steps.prompt: What was harder than expected? What was easier? What is one thing you want to learn next?
